scenarios.name: partial-source-failure
scenarios.result: healthy durable source retained; failure classified without content

scenarios.name: corrupt-openclaw-history
scenarios.result: malformed JSON and non-message records ignored within bounded tail

scenarios.name: stale-progress
scenarios.result: stale and terminal progress filtered while fresh active progress remains recoverable

scenarios.name: sse-disconnect
scenarios.result: disconnect does not mutate or remove active run

scenarios.name: sse-reconnect-replay
scenarios.result: Last-Event-ID replay remains ordered and idempotent

scenarios.name: application-restart
scenarios.result: durable terminal message recovered; unavailable transient activity not fabricated

scenarios.name: concurrent-polling-refresh
scenarios.result: 32 concurrent reads returned copied deterministic order and lifecycle

scenarios.name: cache-eviction
scenarios.result: entry bound enforced and evicted source reloaded as a miss

scenarios.name: one-provider-unavailable
scenarios.result: failure contained to selected source and unrelated durable contribution remained available

command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_conversation_timeline_recovery.py tests/test_conversation_timeline_sources.py tests/test_openclaw_timeline_source.py tests/test_provider_events.py tests/test_provider_sse_transport.py tests/test_codex_runs_sse.py tests/test_codex_workflow_timeline_source.py tests/test_chat_history_api.py
